---
title: "GIS Portfolio"
---

Highlighting spatial analysis and geological mapping projects.

::: {layout-ncol=2}
### Appalachian Knickpoint Analysis
![](images/site_fig.jpg)

### Geological Mapping
![](images/Geology_map.png)
:::

::: {layout-ncol=2}
### USDA Map Series
![](images/map_ser.jpg)

### New Hampshire Forest Cover
![](images/mapchallenge1.jpg)
:::
